chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4312 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19065/2024. 2. For haring of main case. 13.10.2025 Mr. Atir Aqeel Ansari, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for KMC. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the prayer clause has become infructuous with respect to the question of his seniority. He submits that once the new seniority list is prepared, the petitioner may be placed in a junior position, and in such case, he may make a representation before the concerned authority. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of as infructuous. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
